title: SEESUNO 40 Pcs Sewing Tool Set, Multi-Purpose Needle and Thread Kit Including Stainless Steel Sewing Needles Thimble Needle Threader Suture Remover Storage Case
features: Comprehensive Kit: This 40 pcs sewing tool set includes a variety of essential tools for sewing, embroidery, and mending, making it a versatile addition to any sewing project
Stainless Steel Needles: The set features stainless steel sewing needles in various sizes, ensuring durability and precision for different fabric types and sewing tasks
Thimble and Needle Threader: Includes a thimble for added comfort and a needle threader for easy threading, making sewing more efficient and comfortable
Suture Remover: The suture remover is designed for easy removal of stitches, ensuring clean and precise alterations or repairs
Storage Case: The included storage case keeps steel needles organized and protected, making it easy to transport and store your sewing supplies
